message:
feat(python): numpy.quantile wrapper parity (franken_numpy-k6jp)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.quantile covering scalar and
vector q in [0, 1], axis, `out=`, overwrite_input, method selector,
keepdims, and the keyword-only weights argument. Test covers q=0.5
(median) on 1-D, vector quartiles, 2-D axis=0/1, all five documented
methods (linear/lower/higher/nearest/midpoint), keepdims shape parity,
integer input dtype promotion, q=0/1 (min/max) edges, and a cross-check
that quantile(0.5) equals percentile(50).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
